Title: Lieberman, Bill
Overview: Jacques and Natasha Gelman Chairman of the Modern Art Department, Metropolitan Museum of Art. Founding member of the Print Council of America. Lieberman was the curator of painting at the Museum of Modern Art, under whom the first Pollock retrospective occurred in 1967.
Selected Bibliography: Pablo Picasso: Blue and Rose Periods. New York: H. N. Abrams, 1971.
Sources: "The Beginnings of the Print Council of America." Zigrosser, Carl. A World of Art and Museums. Philadelphia: Art Alliance Press, 1975, p. 294ff;
